form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding lining up for the second time. At debut 7th (Fr2) over 2190m at Maryborough, at the bell was 9th-14.6 beaten 14 m by Colosimo (2:42.20) in 3yo 10 0K on March 16 at $11.

form.formComment: Racing consistently. Last start by a neck (Fr3) at Maryborough (2:42.20) beating Black Opal Jack in 3yo 10 0K on March 16 at $8 at the bell was 4th-5.3. Has a low draw and could go on with it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out for much of the race.

form.formComment: Resumed from a 361-day break with a strong win a big 9 m win as favourite (Sr2) at Bendigo (2:35.30) beating Keayang Passion in 3yo 10 0K on March 25 at $1.95. Promising and the good draw should see him hard to stop.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke clear of interference approaching the 400m.
Shifted out under pressure approaching the 150m.

form.formComment: Racing consistently with minor placings at her last two starts. Placed last start was well back in the run when 3rd (Fr5) over 2190m at Maryborough was 7th-11.2 at the bell, beaten 4.5 m by Colosimo (2:42.20) in 3yo 10 0K on March 16 at $31. Before that 3rd (Fr1) over 1720m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was 2nd-4.12 beaten 2.75 m by Im The Reason (2:05.30) in 0-2 WINS on March 6 at $61. Hard to enthuse.

Broke early in the score up.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd (Fr2) over 1785m at Stawell, at the bell was 2nd-3.7 beaten 6 m by Rocknroll Willow (2:11.40) in 0-2 WINs on April 3 at $5. Two runs back 5th (Sr1) over 2150m at Bendigo, beaten 13 m by Mount Barker Boy (2:35.30) in 3yo 10 0K on March 25 at $61. Leaning to others.

form.formComment: Promising type show didn't do much at the end of his last preparation. Fair return to racing first up 4th (Sr3) over 2150m at Bendigo beaten 11 m by Mount Barker Boy (2:35.30) in 3yo 10 0K on March 25 at $41. Open to plenty of improvement.

form.formComment: Finished second at his last two starts since resuming from a spell. Last outing was beaten 6 metres behind Steam Machine at Ararat over 2195m 0-1 WIN on March 23. Racing very well. First four hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second at his last two starts since resuming from a spell. Last outing was beaten 6 metres behind Steam Machine at Ararat over 2195m 0-1 WIN on March 23. Racing very well. First four hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inclined to hang in during the middle and later stages.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Fr2) over 2150m at Bendigo, beaten 18 m by Mount Barker Boy (2:35.30) in 3yo 10 0K on March 25 at $71. Showed ability the race before when she won by 2.5 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Kilmore (2:05.30) beating Keayang Alabama in MAIDEN on March 12 at $2.40 at the bell was leading 1.75. May bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Posted a big 8 m win (Sr2) at Shepparton (2:02.30) beating The Final Dance in MAIDEN on March 24 at $4 at the bell was leading 1.8. Two runs back surrendered the lead and finished 4th (Fr1) over 2190m after showing early speed at Maryborough was 3rd-4.8 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Colosimo (2:42.20) in 3yo 10 0K on March 16 at $5.50. Might find this beyond her.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted the marker pegs approaching entrance to the sprint lane.
Gave ground over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Meets Mount Barker Boy again; was restrained, when 15 metres sixth at Bendigo over 2150m in a 3yo 10 0K race on March 25. Facing a testing assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Meets Mount Barker Boy again; was restrained, when 15 metres sixth at Bendigo over 2150m in a 3yo 10 0K race on March 25. Facing a testing assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Mount Barker Boy at Bendigo over 2150m in a 3yo 10 0K on March 25 at $3.80. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.3 m finishing second behind Franco Nickelback at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 55 on April 4 at $1.65. Working up to a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced throughout the early and middle stages.
Raced keenly during the middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start good run when 2nd (Fr3) over 2150m after being wide early at Bendigo beaten 9 m by Mount Barker Boy (2:35.30) in 3yo 10 0K on March 25 at $3.30. Two runs back won by a nose when quickly away, (Fr4) at Mt Gambier (2:08.80) beating Zanda Man in 3yo No NR on March 14 at $2.20. Among the leading chances if she can overcome the tricky draw.
